case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY VS SHAW PIPELINE INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,043.43 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE INC. $1,043.43 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,093.43 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE INC.
